context: CNC machines are computer numerical control machines used for machining operations such as milling, drilling, cutting, and automated part manufacturing.

responses: Hello! How can I help you with CNC today?
CNC means computer numerical control. It uses programmed instructions to move tools and machine parts automatically with high precision.
Homing a CNC machine means moving the axes to their reference position so the controller knows the machine's starting location.
Tool offset stores the tool length or position difference so the CNC controller can machine accurately with different tools.
